text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No matter the race, our aim is always to<n>win, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But in reality... Victory alone is not<n>enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is my familial duty to not just win, but<n>win in an
elegant and magnificent<n>fashion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, even at the Tenno Sho, I plan<n>to show
the crowd exactly how a Mejiro<n>runs.
